name: Movie Candy Caramel Corn
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Favorite candy (e.g., candy corn, mini chocolate mints)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 200°C (392°F).
2. In a large roasting pan, combine popcorn and pretzels; set aside.
3. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine brown sugar, butter, corn syrup, and salt. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture comes to a boil (12-14 minutes).
4. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until a candy thermometer reads 238°C (480°F) or a small amount of mix dropped in ice water forms a soft ball (4-6 minutes). Remove from heat; stir in baking soda.
5. Pour over the popcorn mixture; sprinkle peanuts evenly over the coating. Stir until popcorn is coated.
6. Transfer to a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Continue baking for another 25 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and stir. Immediately place caramel corn on waxed paper; cool completely.
8. Break into pieces. Store in a tightly covered container.
Makes 24 cups.
